pr.title: [10min/16MB]  AWQ + Cyclic Momentum + ReLU² + 11L Shared — 1.1507 bpb

output.summary: Combines AWQ per-channel scaling with cyclic Muon momentum, ReLU² MLPs, and 11-layer shared weights to power an efficient int5/int6 quantized 10min/16MB model.
techniques: AWQ per-channel scaling before int5/int6 quantization
Cyclic Muon momentum (0.85–0.95 triangle wave) post-warmup
ReLU² MLPs with 11-block depth via 10 shared weight sets
